headline: Flowserve Adds Duke Energy CFO To Board As Governance Focus Grows
summary: Flowserve (NYSE:FLS) has expanded its board of directors and appointed Brian Savoy, CFO of Duke Energy, as a new director. Savoy will also join Flowserve's audit committee, adding senior finance and transformation experience to the board. Flowserve, trading at $71.4, has seen its share price move in different directions across timeframes, with a 43.3% return over the past year and a 137.8% return over three years. The stock is roughly flat year to date at 0.9%, while the past month shows a...
